data.title: Liberty Gold’s Black Pine Project Accepted into U.S. FAST-41 Permitting Framework
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Liberty Gold ( (TSE:LGD) ) has shared an announcement.

Liberty Gold Corp. has secured acceptance of its Black Pine Oxide Gold Project in southeastern Idaho into the U.S. Federal Permitting Improvement Steering Committee’s FAST-41 framework as a Covered Project, granting the company access to a coordinated federal and state permitting timetable and a project advisor to improve interagency alignment, transparency and accountability. Management and Idaho’s Lieutenant Governor framed the move as a key milestone that underscores Black Pine’s maturity as a brownfield development and its potential economic benefits for rural communities, while Liberty Gold continues to push forward on feasibility-level engineering, ongoing environmental baseline work and parallel state and federal permitting efforts for what is described as one of the largest undeveloped gold projects in the Great Basin.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LGD) stock is a Hold with a C$0.84 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Liberty Gold stock, see the TSE:LGD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:LGD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:LGD is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn), partially mitigated by very low leverage. Offsetting this, technicals show a strong uptrend and momentum, while corporate events are supportive with permitting/feasibility progress and improved financing. Valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:LGD stock, click here.

More about Liberty Gold

Liberty Gold is a U.S.-focused gold development company with a portfolio of projects in the Great Basin, one of the world’s most productive and mining-friendly gold regions. Its flagship asset is the 100%-owned Black Pine Oxide Gold Project in southern Idaho, a large-scale, past-producing run-of-mine heap leach operation now being advanced through feasibility and permitting toward a modern open-pit mine, complemented by the Goldstrike Project in Utah.

Average Trading Volume: 800,077

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$458.9M

For a thorough assessment of LGD stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Servcorp Lifts FY26 Earnings and Cash Flow Guidance on Strong Global Operating Momentum
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Servcorp Limited ( (AU:SRV) ) has issued an announcement.

Servcorp has upgraded its profit and cash flow guidance for the 2026 financial year on the back of stronger operational performance and revenue efficiency across its global serviced office portfolio. The company now expects underlying NPBIT of $80 million to $84 million, up from a prior range of $72 million to $76 million, underlying free cash of at least $100 million versus $90 million previously, and dividends of at least 32 cents per share, compared with a minimum of 30 cents. Management attributes the improved outlook to higher occupancy, pricing discipline, better service conversion and operational efficiencies across a largely fixed cost base, alongside strong cash generation supported by effective working capital and lease management. With unencumbered cash at historically high levels and a scalable operating model spanning 136 floors in 38 cities, Servcorp says it is positioned to continue maximising revenue from mature locations while pursuing selective expansion, reinforcing its resilience in a mixed macroeconomic environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SRV) stock is a Buy with a A$8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Servcorp Limited stock, see the AU:SRV Stock Forecast page.

More about Servcorp Limited

Servcorp Limited is a global provider of flexible workspace solutions, operating a market‑leading portfolio of serviced offices, coworking spaces and virtual office services. The company operates 136 floors across 38 cities in 19 countries, leveraging its scale, proprietary IT platform and cybersecurity ecosystem to serve business clients in a diversified range of markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 69,697

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$673.2M

See more data about SRV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Worley Wins Key Engineering Role on UK H2East Hydrogen Pipeline
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Worley Limited ( (AU:WOR) ) has provided an update.

Worley has secured the Front End Engineering Design and Development Consent Order contract from UK gas network operator Cadent Gas for the H2East Pipeline: Humber to Nottinghamshire project, having already completed earlier feasibility and pre-FEED work. Under the new mandate, Worley will deliver project management, integration, engineering and design for a new hydrogen pipeline network intended to connect industrial hubs across the North East, Humber, Yorkshire and East Midlands, enabling up to 11 gigawatts of low-carbon hydrogen production capacity and supporting decarbonisation of heavy industries such as steel, chemicals and power generation. The contract underscores Worley’s growing role in large-scale sustainable energy and pipeline projects and reinforces its positioning as a key partner in the UK’s hydrogen ambitions, with the H2East network expected to deliver both emissions reductions and economic benefits when operations commence in the next decade.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:WOR) stock is a Buy with a A$17.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Worley Limited stock, see the AU:WOR Stock Forecast page.

More about Worley Limited

Worley Limited is a global professional services company headquartered in Australia and listed on the ASX, providing engineering, project management and technical services to the energy, chemicals and resources sectors. The company focuses on supporting customers across the full lifecycle of their assets while helping them transition toward more sustainable energy systems.

Average Trading Volume: 1,683,795

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.69B

data.title: Tetratherix Confirms Appointment of Biomedicine Veteran Maurizio Vecchione to Board
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tetratherix Limited ( (AU:TTX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tetratherix Limited has confirmed the appointment of Maurizio Vecchione as an independent non-executive director, following completion of regulatory requirements including his director identification number and consent to act. Vecchione, a veteran of more than three decades in biomedicine and Chief Innovation Officer at the Terasaki Institute for Biomedical Innovation, brings extensive experience in health technologies, material sciences, and nano-bio-polymers, which aligns closely with Tetratherix’s polymer platform. His endorsement of the company’s technology as potentially transformative for drug delivery, tissue engineering and global health equity underscores the strategic significance of his appointment and is likely to strengthen Tetratherix’s innovation credentials and industry positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TTX) stock is a Buy with a A$5.76 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tetratherix Limited stock, see the AU:TTX Stock Forecast page.

More about Tetratherix Limited

Tetratherix Limited (ASX: TTX) is a biotechnology company developing novel clinical products based on a patented biomaterial polymer platform technology, with applications across drug delivery and tissue engineering aimed at improving patient care and global health outcomes.

data.title: Morella Sues Former Receivers Over 2020 Asset Sale Proceeds
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Morella Corporation ( (AU:1MC) ) has provided an update.

Morella Corporation Limited has launched legal proceedings in the Federal Court of Australia against its former receivers and managers over the handling of proceeds from a 2020 asset sale undertaken during the receivership of Altura Mining Limited, the entity that later became Morella. After a detailed review and external legal advice, the board is seeking court relief to recover funds it believes should have been returned to the company, asserting that the move is aimed at protecting and enhancing shareholder value while underlining its governance and transparency commitments; the company does not expect the litigation to materially affect its ongoing operations, exploration programs or development activities but acknowledges that the timing and outcome of the case remain uncertain.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:1MC) stock is a Hold with a A$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Morella Corporation stock, see the AU:1MC Stock Forecast page.

More about Morella Corporation

Morella Corporation Limited is an exploration and resource development company focused on critical minerals across Tier 1 jurisdictions in Australia and the United States. The company is actively exploring lithium, rubidium and titanium resources, aiming to supply raw materials essential for the clean energy transition and high-value industrial applications.

Average Trading Volume: 396,298

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$18.42M

data.title: China Vanke Convenes Bondholders’ Meeting to Seek Extension of Rental Housing Bonds
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China Vanke Co ( (HK:2202) ) has provided an update.

China Vanke has convened its first 2026 bondholders’ meeting for its 2021 corporate bonds specialized in rental housing (first tranche, variety II), known as “21 Vanke 02,” to consider proposals related to extending the maturity and repayment schedule of the bonds. The meeting, organized by bond trustee CITIC Securities under applicable corporate bond regulations and existing bondholder meeting rules, is part of the company’s effort to steadily promote the orderly repayment of principal and interest on this rental-housing-focused instrument, with implications for bondholder returns and Vanke’s ongoing management of its financing structure amid a challenging property market environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2202) stock is a Sell with a HK$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Vanke Co stock, see the HK:2202 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Vanke Co

China Vanke Co., Ltd. is a major mainland Chinese real estate developer, with significant activities in residential and rental housing projects and related property services, serving both homebuyers and institutional investors in the domestic property market.
